text_block_list.text:
After returning from Hokkaido… to make up for
the training time she'd missed, I put together
a special high-intensity training menu.

The workload was extremely demanding, but
Buena Vista stayed focused and pushed
through it brilliantly. And as a result…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hah… hah…!!
Circuit training complete…!
choice_data_list: Alright, that's the full menu done!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yes…! Thank you very much…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Haaahh… It's finally overrrr…!
choice_data_list: Good work. Was it rough?
Good work. Was it rough?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Very! I thought I couldn't do the last burpee
jump anymore～…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
But because of that… I can really feel how
much I've grown. Thanks for reworking the
training menu for me!
choice_data_list: (…Good. She doesn't seem tense anymore.)
(…Good. She doesn't seem tense anymore.)

text_block_list.text: The excitement from everyone around her, the emotions Buena Vista had unknowingly absorbed into her heart… It seemed she'd finally managed to let all of it go.
choice_data_list: Now all that's left is the Shuka Sho.
Now all that's left is the Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yeah. But… will I really be okay?
choice_data_list: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I ended up taking in everyone's excitement so
deeply, right? And it started affecting me in a
bad way.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: So if the same thing happens again…
choice_data_list: Then we'll figure something else out.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Something else…?
choice_data_list: Kyoto RC has that big pond, doesn't it?
Kyoto RC has that big pond, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Huh? Yeah… inside the dirt course.
choice_data_list: Maybe we'll just let you float in it.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Ehhh…!? I don't know about that, there's
probably a better solution…
choice_data_list: I'll think of anything, so don't worry.
I'll think of anything, so don't worry.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …! Ah…
choice_data_list: Just leave it to me, focus on your race.
Just leave it to me, focus on your race.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Okay. Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll take you up on that… and lean on you
a little.

After completing a deeply fulfilling summer
camp, both physically and mentally, Buena
Vista returned to Tracen Academy. And waiting
there for her was…

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Welcome back, Buena!
How was summer camp?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the warm welcome! Hehe, I
think you can tell just by looking at me!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
You really do look refreshed! Now then,
regarding your next race…

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
You're still aiming for the final Tiara title, the
Shuka Sho, correct? Which means… there'll be
no attempt at the Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …! Ah…

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, it's just that expectations from the
public have been extremely high…!

We'd heard those voices too. With Tiara
horsegirls finding success on the world stage
in recent years, it was only natural that
expectations gathered around Buena Vista.

To conquer the Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe, the
long-held dream of Japanese racing, surely the
view waiting there would be breathtaking beyond
words. But…
choice_data_list: She will not be running in this year's Arc.

text_block_list.text:
Buena Vista would see the Triple Tiara through
to the end. That had been the goal from the
very beginning.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
I see… I imagine some fans will be
disappointed to hear that. Do you have any
message for them?
choice_data_list: Buena will show you a breathtaking view…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
choice_data_list: …at the Shuka Sho, right in front of you.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Ah… I guess that's true. If it's the Arc, it'd all be happening
so far away from everyone.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
…You're right. And the showdown with Desire
is only going to become even more intense…
We'll be looking forward to the Shuka Sho as
well!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…If I were unbelievably strong… would there
have been a path leading to the Arc too…?
choice_data_list: Buena…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Ah! It's not like I regret anything or feel
uncertain, okay? This is the road we chose
together.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: But maybe… there could've been a future like that too. Just a what if, I guess.
choice_data_list: But that isn't your dream. Right?
But that isn't your dream. Right?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Yeah. My dream is to create a breathtaking
view that reaches everyone.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, I understand. I want to stay close to
everyone…
choice_data_list: Then let's make the Shuka Sho breathtaking.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: Hah… hah…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: Fuuuuhhh…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Now then… what should I do next, I wonder.
Training worthy of a saint—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: …Perhaps you should take a short rest.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: …!! Cafe!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
What brings you here? Could it be… you too
have come to undergo training?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No. I was waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
…The tension in your muscles. The shadows
in your eyes. Even during summer camp, it
seems you pushed yourself quite hard.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
For an ordinary person, this is about the point
their body would begin to break down.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
…Yes. For an ordinary person… that would be
true.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: But… I am one who was chosen.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
I can endure more training than others.
Become stronger. Shine brighter…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Because I am special! I can become the
version of myself worthy of me. And so… this
much suffering means nothing.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: …Yes. You are that kind of person.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
Red Desire
text_block_list.text: …! …Would you truly grant me your teachings?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
…I believe I understand quite well the feeling
of chasing after something unseen.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
…You have my gratitude. Please… help lift me
higher.

Whose dream will come true?
The Shuka Sho is drawing ever closer.
